## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Checklist content
- [ ] Accessibility or usability fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Maintenance

## Review Notes

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to?

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is written in plain language
- [ ] The change is useful for designers, developers, or small product teams
- [ ] Documentation was updated if needed
